text.title: typescript-react-2026 Decision Tree
text.summary: Per-file boundary classification and per-mutation revalidate strategy.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the file use any React hook, browser API, or event handler?

branch.conclusion: boundary="server-default". No 'use client'. Server Components can directly access DB and secrets.
REJECT. Extract the stateful subtree into its own client component file; keep the layout server. The decision tree fails this branch.
boundary="use-client". If the file is a form, wire it with useActionState (NOT useFormState) + a SubmitButton using useFormStatus.

branch.question: Does this Server Action mutate data?

branch.conclusion: revalidate.kind="none". Read-only actions do not invalidate cache.

branch.question: Does the mutation affect one known route or multiple unrelated routes that share a tag?

branch.conclusion: revalidate.kind="path", target=<route>. Add revalidatePath(target) before returning success.
revalidate.kind="tag", target=<tag>. All fetches with that tag invalidate together.

text.example: file=app/dashboard/Sidebar.tsx, uses hooks=true, is layout=false q-uses-client -> true q-is-layout -> false => conclusion r4-useactionstate: boundary=use-client.
